equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: full decode and executor/TTL guards exist, but the invariant requires rejecting any empty model.

checked_queries: PersistentAgentRequest full ABI decode empty model
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Persistent-agent payload validation decodes the full ABI and validates executor/TTL, but it permits an empty model when restore_from_cid is non-empty.
related_but_insufficient_code: The same function returns EmptyModel only when both model and restore_from_cid are empty.
A local test named persistent_agent_validation_accepts_restore_payload_without_model asserts a payload with empty model and restore_from_cid is accepted.

notes: The implementation has intentionally broader acceptance than the invariant statement.
rationale: The commit imports PersistentAgentRequest and PERSISTENT_AGENT_PRECOMPILE, routes 0x0820 through validate_persistent_agent_payload, and validates executor, ttl, max ttl, and model after a full ABI decode. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: RPC async payload validation for PERSISTENT_AGENT_PRECOMPILE must decode the full PersistentAgentRequest ABI and reject payloads with zero executor, ttl equal to zero, ttl above max_ttl_blocks(), or an empty model.
suggested_falsification_tests: Submit persistent-agent RPC payloads that fail full ABI decoding, have executor zero, ttl 0, ttl above max_ttl_blocks(), and blank model; assert each is rejected, while a well-formed payload with nonzero executor, valid ttl, and model is accepted past static validation.
summary: Persistent-agent validation allows an empty model with restore CID.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Submit a persistent-agent payload with nonzero executor, valid TTL, empty model, and non-empty restore_from_cid and assert validation rejects EmptyModel; current tests assert acceptance.
title: Persistent agent payloads are fully decoded
